services.title: Get
services.description: We do more than just buy products for you. We go to your preferred locations around Johannesburg, South Africa, Collect your items, and deliver them to Mozambique
services.service1info: Pick a product you want from any South African store like, PEP, HiFi Corp, Dis-Chem and more - then we'll handle the shopping for you. We also offer delivery
services.service2info: Did you order a product online already? We handle the physical collection from offices or stores on your behalf
services.service3info: Need an item picked up from a private residence like your friend's house in Johannesburg? We've got you covered
services.service4info: Once we've bought or collected your item, you choose whether you want delivery to Mozambique or pickup from South Africa

howItWorks.title: How it
howItWorks.info1: Contact us on Whatsapp or use the Order Form below
howItWorks.info2: Provide the name of the product you want us to buy or collect
howItWorks.info3: Provide the store name or location where your product can be found
howItWorks.info4: A quotation will be sent to your WhatsApp number and email address
howItWorks.info5: Provide proof of payment via WhatsApp or email
howItWorks.info6: Once payment is made, we'll buy or collect your product from your chosen location
howItWorks.info7: Then you choose whether you want delivery or collection option
howItWorks.ctaInfo: Let us buy or collect your product Today!

reviews.review1: ``I dont have to worry about running around stores or traveling all the way to South Africa to buy products. They made shopping so easy for me. Highly recommended!``
reviews.review3: ``Incredible service! I just sent a list of products I wanted and everything was bought from all the stores i mentioned, 'Ackermans', 'iStore' and 'Studio 88'. After the purchase they delivered my products to Maputo. Professional, fast and reliable.``
reviews.review4: Sua satisfação é a nossa felicidade.
reviews.review5: This website is so effective and helpful, I don't need to travel from Mozambique to South Africa just to collect my orders from Takealot and other stores, they collect them for me and send them to my location in Maputo.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.answer1: Use our Website(form) or WhatsApp to let us know which product you want us to buy or collect from any location in South Africa, Johannesburg. We'll go to your chosen location, get your product and send you pictures. You then let us know if you want us to handle delivery or you'll send someone to pick up in South Africa.
faq.answer2: Once your items are purchased or collected, we work with reliable delivery company to transport the products Mozambique. You'll be contacted the next morining upon arrival, then go to collect safely using the WhatsApp receipt we provide.
faq.question3: How much does your service cost?
faq.answer3: After placing an order (WhatsApp or Website form), we'll send you a quotation displaying how much the service will cost, as it depends on the size of the item.
faq.question4: How do i know my money is safe?
faq.answer4: Payment method is MPESA, and your payments are handled securely and transparently. We confirm items availability before purchasing, we send photos of the product and let you decide if you will take it or not, we also provide receipts for every order, and keep you updated throughout the process. Your trust matters to us, and we only work with verified stores and reliable delivery companies.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.info1: Our mission comes from knowing what it feels like to need something important and not know how to get it. I dedicate myself to helping our people back home by buying and collecting their products from South Africa then deliver to Mozambique. You no longer need to travel to South Africa just to buy a certain product - It can be electronics, clothing, or business supplies - We handle every order personally with care, transparency and attention to detail.
mission.info2: This isn't just collection and delivery work to me, I don't see packages - I see people trusting me with their needs. It's about reliability and connection, about being someone you can depend on when it matters most.

footer.slogan: Your Reliable Link Between S.A and MOZ
footer.ourAgent: Speak to our agent from Monday to Sunday 08:00 - 17:00
